concepts.title: Reactions due to H atom of COOH grp
concepts.conceptBody:
Chemical Properties

Reactions of carboxylic acids can be discussed under four heads:

(1) Reactions due to $\text{H}$ atom of $-\text{COOH}$ group

(2) Reactions due to $-\text{OH}$ part

(3) Reactions due to $-\text{COOH}$ group

(4) Reactions due to R-part

I. Reactions due to H atom of $\mathbf{-COOH}$ part
